package.name: openral_human_estop
package.description: ADR-0018 §5 bullet 2 — human-driven estop forwarders. Subscribes to /openral/human_estop and republishes onto /openral/estop with a structured FailureTrigger(KIND_HUMAN). The actual UI / Slack / voice adapters publish onto /openral/human_estop and this node bridges to the canonical estop topic.
